## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment

| Field          | Value |
| -------------- | ----- |
| Browser        | e.g., Chrome 120, Firefox 121 |
| OS             | e.g., macOS 14.2, Windows 11 |
| fewer version  | e.g., 0.2.0 |
| Import method  | e.g., File System Access API, Import from File, Sample project |

## Graph State (optional)

If the issue involves the graph canvas, export your graph as JSON and paste it below to help us reproduce:

```json
{
  "nodes": [],
  "edges": [],
  "viewport": {}
}
```

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., console errors, specific file structures).
